title: Water Crews Working to Repair Water Main Leak on West Street
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is repairing a water main leak on West Street between Erie Boulevard and West Fayette Street. The repair may cause water service disruptions and traffic delays in the area, with the Erie Boulevard exit closed until work is completed. Residents and businesses can contact the Department of Water at (315) 448-8360 for questions.
